textByHashes.d6d072d745463e56f7cbddd33e77f05681fda5af: I'm Torgan, one of the elders. I'm something of a specialist when it comes to fletching. In particular, I guide the juveniles as they fletch their own spear during their Trial by Water.
textByHashes.972d71668ed2c21348b8c1541b89433809595919: Indeed it is, young one. There has always been a tortugan fletcher in charge of the Trial. Before me it was Elder Manna, who taught me all that I know. Before him it was Elder Sarr.
textByHashes.68a3922147a6d95c9a59f8d6e6caec56395b9fc7: Eventually, I will be succeeded as well. There are many tortugan adults out there who studied under me as juveniles. One day, one of them will take on my role.
textByHashes.2bc90207ce9eac25edb144926f2e6167a91c22b7: Every adult will one day return to the Conch. With their adventuring days at an end, they will settle here as an elder.
textByHashes.87a9aa5cba7618999b14a7afb02c9286171a2b84: Whenever that happens, it is a chance for us current elders to consider if the time has come to take a step back. Soon, it will be time for me to hand over my duties, but until then, my work continues.
